Country Name Reconciliation

Public crosswalk hints list systematic name variants seen across international health and development sources.

country_name_variants.csvcountry_metadata.csv

The crosswalk is a hint table, not a complete authority list.

canonical_countryvariant_nameiso3reconciliation_note
United StatesUnited States of AmericaUSACommon formal name
Cote d'IvoireIvory CoastCIVEnglish exonym
BoliviaBolivia (Plurinational State of)BOLWHO-style formal name
CzechiaCzech RepublicCZEFormer short/formal name
EswatiniSwazilandSWZFormer country name
Korea, Rep.South KoreaKORShort press name
TurkiyeTurkeyTURCommon variant
Viet NamVietnamVNMCommon variant
Lao PDRLaosLAOShort name
Kyrgyz RepublicKyrgyzstanKGZShort name
Slovak RepublicSlovakiaSVKShort name
EgyptEgypt, Arab Rep.EGYWorld Bank variant
Static Web portal. CSV downloads are served directly from /data/.
